untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) identification of 'downtrend' as a distinct market state — not directly measurable from allowed indicators without multi-candle analysis; (2) 'reversal sign' definition — not a standard indicator; (3) 'next candle confirmation' — requires forward-looking logic incompatible with backtest structure; (4) 'higher timeframe resistance/support' — requires multi-timeframe data not available; (5) '3, 5, 8 candle rule' — unexplained pattern not translatable without clarification. Partial translation provided using lower_wick as proxy for reversal candlestick, but full signal intent cannot be captured.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses lower_wick > body as a reversal candlestick proxy, but the signal's reliance on undefined 'reversal signs', the '3-5-8 candle rule', multi-timeframe context, and forward-looking confirmation logic makes complete translation impossible with the given indicator set.
